treatment_information.treatment_response: Despite prophylactic measures, she continued to develop recurrent pyogenic infections.
Despite such prophylactic measures, she continued to develop recurrent pyogenic infections.
The abscesses failed to resolve completely.

treatment_timeline.event: Diagnosed with Kostmann’s syndrome at 4 months of age
Started receiving subcutaneous G-CSF injections at a dose of 5 μg/kg/day and prophylactic antibacterial therapy
Presented with drowsiness and multiple abscesses detected via CT scan
Bone marrow aspiration revealed features suggestive of myelodysplastic syndrome (MDS) progressing to acute myeloid leukemia
Patient passed away due to septicaemia

patient_outcome.complications: Myelodysplastic syndrome (MDS) progressing to acute myeloid leukemia, septicaemia
